I am a UX and market researcher built on curiosity and guided by exploration.

Driven by curiosity and guided by an open mind, I’m always exploring new ways to understand people, solve problems, and uncover meaningful insights. I enjoy digging deeper, asking thoughtful questions, and turning exploration into ideas that create impact.

About me

I'm an emerging UX and market researcher with a passion for branding and a focus on retail and consumer packaged goods.

These interests were solidified during my time pursing my Master of Science in Applied Psychology at the University of Southern California. My research interest began at Indiana University where I earned my Bachelor of Arts in Psychology with minors in business and sociology. During my time at Indiana University, I spent time as a Research Assistant for the IU Cognition and Learning Lab where I conducted extensive qualitative and quantitative research to assess learning outcomes in math for young children.

I was also a Research Assistant for a project that analyzed how students with autism navigated the college experience.

Those experiences piqued my interest in using my curiosity to uncover patterns which can be transformed into actionable insights. More recently, I have found myself most interested in research for retail companies but am happy to get my hands on any project that allows me to learn!

Beyond research, I have experience in social media. Aside from being a Digital and PR Intern for a talent management agency and a Social Media Manager for a country club, I have many years of experience creating short-form video content tailored to audience preferences on Instagram. I also dabble with photography and videography in my free time.

In my free time, I typically find myself in the climbing gym attempting my latest project. When I'm not on some spontaneous adventure of the day, I also like to hike, ski, read, play tennis, or spend time with friends and family. If you're looking for me, I'll likely be in the great outdoors :)

Work experiences

Insight Accelerator

Contractor

As part of a retail-focused project, I supported the research process from planning to final delivery. I designed an in-depth interview (IDI) guide, conducted qualitative interviews to explore consumer shopping behaviors and perceptions, and synthesized findings into actionable insights. I then translated those insights into a client-facing presentation and an external report, tailoring the storytelling and structure for different audiences. This project strengthened my skills in qualitative research, insight development, strategic storytelling, and transforming consumer feedback into clear, business-relevant recommendations.

Client-facing presentations Consulting Strategic recommendations
KEY Talent Management Link

Digital and PR Intern

As part of a brand partnership and talent marketing initiative, I supported campaign efforts from content development through outreach strategy. I created visually consistent, brand-aligned materials for campaigns and talent profiles, built relationships with creators, international brands, and PR agencies, and researched targeted brand and media contacts for influencer outreach. I then helped translate these efforts into stronger collaboration pipelines and more effective campaign alignment. This experience strengthened my skills in brand communication, partnership development, strategic research, and aligning creative assets with campaign goals.

Influencer marketing Market research Visual brand alignment
IU Cognition and Learning Lab Link

Undergraduate Research Assistant

I supported the evaluation of math and reading comprehension outcomes in young children using both qualitative and quantitative analysis. I analyzed findings to develop targeted, needs-based recommendations for improving learning, and created data-informed publicity materials in RStudio to raise awareness around quantitative skill development in young adults. I also maintained accurate and confidential participant records in accordance with IRB standards, ensuring data integrity and research quality. This experience strengthened my skills in data analysis, research ethics, insight development, and translating findings into impactful, audience-facing materials.

Data reporting Data integrity Research communication
College Life and Beyond Project

Research Assistant

I analyzed and coded over 5,000 qualitative data entries in Microsoft Excel to classify user profiles and streamline data processing for research analysts. I ensured accuracy and consistency by following standardized research and industry protocols, and collaborated cross-functionally to validate findings and maintain alignment across datasets. This experience strengthened my skills in data analysis, quality assurance, cross-functional collaboration, and managing large-scale research data.

Qualitative data coding Data cleaning Workflow optimization
Cress Creek Country Club – Tennis

Social Media Manager

This experience strengthened my skills in content creation, visual storytelling, social media strategy, and maintaining a cohesive digital presence.

Content strategy Graphic design Social media management

Projects

Shearer's

Graduate Student Consultant

I led end-to-end primary research to understand consumer trends and audience behavior within the protein snack industry. I translated research objectives into structured surveys and ad hoc studies using a mixed-methods approach to capture both quantitative data and qualitative insights. I analyzed findings to identify key patterns in consumer preferences, motivations, and purchasing behavior, and designed visualizations to communicate behavioral differences between segments. This experience strengthened my skills in mixed-methods research, data analysis, insight generation, and data visualization.

Data visualization Segmentation Data-driven decision making
Procter and Gamble

Graduate Student Consultant

I designed and executed a mixed-methods UX research study to understand what drives shopper behavior in a digital environment. I conducted over five hours of moderated user testing, combining qualitative insights with quantitative data to identify patterns in decision-making and engagement. I analyzed and synthesized findings to develop clear, actionable recommendations, and communicated insights to stakeholders through concise, insight-driven storytelling. This experience strengthened my skills in UX research, mixed-methods analysis, insight development, and stakeholder communication.

Consumer packaged goods Storytelling Methodology creation
Claude Link

UX Research Foundational Project

I executed a UX research study to evaluate how new and experienced users interact with AI tools to complete everyday tasks. I conducted 17 moderated user interviews to identify gaps in how users evaluate outputs, iterate on responses, and define success. I analyzed findings to uncover that new users often accept suboptimal results due to unclear expectations, and translated insights into the AI Specificity Funnel and product recommendations such as clarifying questions and prompting guidance. This experience strengthened my skills in UX research, behavioral analysis, framework development, and product strategy.

AI literacy Prompt engineering Visual communication
Garmin Link

UX Research Usability Project

I conducted a UX research study to evaluate how users completed alarm-related tasks across three Garmin smartwatch models. I carried out 15 one-on-one in-person and remote user interviews to identify pain points in feature discoverability, hidden interactions, and menu organization. I analyzed findings to develop design recommendations that improved button labeling, simplified navigation, and consolidated alarm settings into a more intuitive experience. This experience strengthened my skills in UX research, usability testing, interaction design, and insight-driven problem solving.

User interviews Wearables Pattern recognition User-centered design
Repeat Experiences Poster Link

Consumer Psychology Project

I designed a two-study experiment to identify a content misprediction problem and evaluate how social influence impacts viewer perceptions. I conducted both studies to analyze how a rewatchability score shapes audience attitudes toward movies. I analyzed findings to uncover opportunities for streaming platforms to promote rewatches, reduce decision fatigue, and increase engagement through features like personalized recommendations and "save to rewatch" options. This experience strengthened my skills in experimental design, behavioral research, data analysis, and product insight development.

Insight generation Entertainment Engagement optimization
Food & Beverage Playbook Link

Qualitative Research Project

I conducted qualitative research to explore how businesses build "hype," focusing on line behavior as a form of social influence. I carried out 4 hours of ethnographic observation and 3 in-depth interviews to examine how food and beverage offerings, visible lines, and strong atmosphere and branding drive foot traffic and shape customer perception. I synthesized findings into actionable insights to help businesses leverage lines as a positive social signal and create more compelling in-person experiences. This experience strengthened my skills in qualitative research, ethnographic observation, behavioral analysis, and insight development.

IDI guide creation Branding Project management
